texto: For me, it's a real shock to see American mainstream films. I can't see these films because it's always the same thing to me. This is very American. Violence is very American, and I can't understand these films. Why do they use violence? To show what? Masculinity? To show fear? Defense? What are you showing with all this violence?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Javier Camara que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “For me, it's a real shock to see American mainstream films. I can't see these films because it's …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sucesso, american, violence, com foco em violence e me.
